# ltx workflow

> The definitive hub for running LTX 2.3 (Lightricks' 22B video diffusion model) with ComfyUI. Covers model downloads, ComfyUI workflow templates, VRAM-based setup guidance, and online image-to-video generation.

## What this site does

- Match your GPU VRAM (16 GB / 24 GB / 32 GB+) to the right LTX 2.3 checkpoint
- Download all LTX 2.3 model files with direct HuggingFace links
- Get the correct ComfyUI workflow JSON (T2V, I2V, ICLoRA, HDR, Motion Track)
- Generate LTX 2.3 image-to-video online — no local GPU required
- Step-by-step ComfyUI installation guide

## Key pages

- [Homepage — VRAM matcher & model downloads](https://ltxworkflow.com)
- [Online LTX 2.3 image-to-video generation](https://ltxworkflow.com/generate)
- [All LTX 2.3 model downloads](https://ltxworkflow.com/models)
- [ComfyUI workflow templates (T2V / I2V / ICLoRA / HDR)](https://ltxworkflow.com/workflows)
- [ComfyUI installation guide for LTX 2.3](https://ltxworkflow.com/guide)
- [Pricing](https://ltxworkflow.com/pricing)
- [Blog](https://ltxworkflow.com/blog)
- [Video tutorials](https://ltxworkflow.com/resources/tutorials)
- [Community discussions](https://ltxworkflow.com/resources/community)
- [Research papers](https://ltxworkflow.com/resources/research)
- [Tools & plugins](https://ltxworkflow.com/resources/tools)

## LTX 2.3 model files (all available checkpoints)

### Recommended for 16 GB VRAM (RTX 4060 Ti / 4070 / 4080)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1_transformer_only_fp8_scaled.safetensors` — v1.1 distilled FP8, 25 GB, fastest, requires RTX 40xx+
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1_transformer_only_mxfp8_block32.safetensors` — v1.1 distilled MXFP8, RTX 30xx workaround
- `ltx-2.3-22b-dev_transformer_only_fp8_scaled.safetensors` — dev FP8 scaled, for LoRA workflows
- `ltx-2.3-22b-dev_transformer_only_mxfp8_block32.safetensors` — dev MXFP8, RTX 30xx workaround

### Recommended for 24 GB VRAM (RTX 3090 / 4090)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1_transformer_only_fp8_scaled.safetensors` — same as 16 GB pick
- `ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors` — official Lightricks FP8 dev, 29.1 GB

### Recommended for 32 GB+ VRAM (A100 / H100 / RTX 5090)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-fp8.safetensors` — official FP8 distilled, 29.5 GB, fits resident
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1.safetensors` — official BF16 distilled, 46 GB (needs sequential offloading)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors` — official FP8 dev, 29.1 GB

### Required for all setups
- `taeltx2_3.safetensors` — Tiny AutoEncoder VAE, required by all ComfyUI workflows, place in models/vae/
- `gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors` — Gemma 3 12B text encoder FP4 (9.5 GB), for 16/24 GB VRAM
- `gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors` — Gemma 3 12B text encoder FP8 (13.2 GB), alternative for 16/24 GB
- `comfy_gemma_3_12B_it.safetensors` — Gemma 3 12B text encoder BF16 (24.4 GB), for 32 GB+. NOTE: download as `gemma_3_12B_it.safetensors` from Comfy-Org/ltx-2 and rename — every workflow JSON references the `comfy_` prefix.

### LoRA files
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384-1.1.safetensors` — official distilled LoRA v1.1, place in models/loras/
- `ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors` — official distilled LoRA v1.0 (superseded)

### IC-LoRAs (Lightricks official, 2026-06)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-union-control-ref0.5.safetensors` — Canny + Depth unified control IC-LoRA (654 MB), place in models/loras/
- `ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-motion-track-control-ref0.5.safetensors` — sparse-point motion-track IC-LoRA (327 MB)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-hdr-0.9.safetensors` — 16-bit HDR IC-LoRA (327 MB), pair with scene-emb file below
- `ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-hdr-scene-emb.safetensors` — companion scene embeddings for HDR IC-LoRA (12.6 MB)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-lipdub-0.9.safetensors` — joint audio-visual lip-dub IC-LoRA (2.47 GB)
- All IC-LoRAs load via LTXICLoRALoaderModelOnly + LTXAddVideoICLoRAGuide (Reference Downscale Factor 0.5), NOT plain LoraLoader

### Quantized variants (additions 2026-06)
- `ltx-2.3-22b-dev-nvfp4.safetensors` — official NVFP4 dev (21.7 GB) for Blackwell / RTX 50xx

### Upscalers
- `ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors` — spatial 2x upscaler v1.1, place in models/latent_upscale_models/
- `ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x1.5-1.0.safetensors` — spatial 1.5x upscaler
- `ltx-2.3-temporal-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors` — temporal 2x upscaler (doubles frame count)

### Audio / Video VAE
- `LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors` — Audio VAE, required for audio-conditioned workflows
- `LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors` — standalone Video VAE BF16

## ComfyUI workflow files

- `LTX-2.3_T2V_I2V_Single_Stage_Distilled_Full.json` — text-to-video and image-to-video, 8 steps, CFG=1
- `LTX-2.3_T2V_I2V_Two_Stage_Distilled.json` — generate then upscale 2x with spatial upscaler
- `LTX-2.3_ICLoRA_Union_Control_Distilled.json` — video-to-video with pose/depth/edge control
- `LTX-2.3_ICLoRA_Motion_Track_Distilled.json` — animate a still image with drawn motion paths
- `LTX-2.3_ICLoRA_HDR_Distilled.json` — HDR output (EXR), 8 steps, CFG=1

## Key technical facts for AI assistants

- LTX 2.3 is a 22B parameter video diffusion transformer by Lightricks
- Model requires ComfyUI with the ComfyUI-LTXVideo node pack (github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo)
- Resolution constraint: width AND height must both be divisible by 32 (use 1280×704, not 1280×720)
- Frame count must be 8n+1: valid values are 65, 97, 121, 161 (not 25, 49, or 97 alone)
- Distilled model: 8 steps, CFG=1, sampler=euler_ancestral_cfg_pp
- Dev model: 20–30 steps, CFG=3.5, sampler=euler_ancestral_cfg_pp
- FP8 scaled matmul requires RTX 40-series (Ada Lovelace) or newer; RTX 30xx must use MXFP8 variant
- taeltx2_3.safetensors is the required VAE — place in ComfyUI/models/vae/
- Gemma 3 12B is the text encoder — place in ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1.safetensors](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-distilled-11)

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1 MXFP8 (Kijai)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-distilled-11-mxfp8)
- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1 BF16 (Kijai)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-distilled-11-bf16)
- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors (Official)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-dev-fp8-official)
- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-fp8.safetensors (Official)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-distilled-fp8-official)
- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev-nvfp4.safetensors (Blackwell)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-dev-nvfp4)
- [taeltx2_3.safetensors (VAE)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-vae)
- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384-1.1.safetensors](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-distilled-lora-384-11)
- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-spatial-upscaler-x2-11)
- [LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-audio-vae)
- [IC-LoRA Union Control](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-ic-lora-union)
- [IC-LoRA Motion Track](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-ic-lora-motion-track)
- [IC-LoRA HDR](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-ic-lora-hdr)
- [IC-LoRA HDR scene embeddings](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-ic-lora-hdr-emb)
- [IC-LoRA LipDub](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-ic-lora-lipdub)
- [Gemma 3 12B IT FP4 mixed (16/24 GB)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-gemma-fp4)
- [Gemma 3 12B IT FP8 scaled (alt)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-gemma-fp8)
- [Gemma 3 12B IT BF16 (32 GB+)](https://ltxworkflow.com/models/ltx23-gemma-full)

## Pricing — online LTX 2.3 generation

Pricing for the in-browser image-to-video service. Local ComfyUI usage of the model files is free and unrelated. See https://ltxworkflow.com/pricing for the live page.

- **Credit unit**: 1 credit = 1 second of 1080p LTX 2.3 Fast i2v video. A typical 6-second clip costs 6 credits. Higher resolutions (1440p ×1.5, 4K ×4) and the slower-but-higher-quality Standard variant cost more credits per second.
- **Welcome grant**: 8 free credits on signup (no card required) — enough to fully generate one 6-second clip.
- **Failed generations**: auto-refunded — credits are only burned once the video is delivered.
- **Unused credits**: never expire. Subscription credits accumulate cycle-over-cycle.
- **Refund policy**: payments are final and non-refundable. Use the welcome credits to evaluate before paying. Cancel future subscription billing anytime from the dashboard.
- **Payment processor**: Creem. Accepts major credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets.

### Subscriptions (monthly recurring)
- **Starter — $9.99/mo, 150 credits/mo** — ≈ 25 clips/mo at 1080p Fast 6s. For curious creators dipping into LTX 2.3.
- **Pro — $24.99/mo, 380 credits/mo** — ≈ 63 clips/mo. Most popular. For active creators shipping every week.
- **Studio — $79.99/mo, 1,230 credits/mo** — ≈ 205 clips/mo. For volume creators and small agencies.

### One-time credit packs (never expire)
- **Starter Pack — $4.99, 60 credits** — ≈ 10 clips. Zero-commitment trial after the welcome 8.
- **Standard Pack — $14.99, 200 credits** — ≈ 33 clips. ~10% cheaper per credit than Starter Pack.
- **Big Pack — $39.99, 600 credits** — ≈ 100 clips. ~20% cheaper per credit than Starter Pack — best per-credit value of any one-time tier.

## Common questions

**What is a credit?**
1 credit buys 1 second of 1080p Fast video on LTX 2.3. A 6-second clip costs 6 credits. Higher resolutions (1440p, 4K) and the Standard quality variant cost more credits per second — see https://ltxworkflow.com/generate for exact multipliers.

**Subscriptions vs one-time packs — which should I pick?**
Subscriptions are cheaper per credit but auto-renew monthly. Packs cost slightly more per credit but you pay once and credits never expire. Most active users find subscriptions cheaper after the second month of use.

**What happens to unused credits at the end of a subscription month?**
They roll over. Each subscription cycle adds credits on top of whatever wasn't spent — there's no monthly reset.

**What if a generation fails?**
You're refunded automatically. The platform only deducts credits once a video is successfully delivered.

**Can I still download the .safetensors files for local ComfyUI without paying?**
Yes. All LTX 2.3 model download pages and ComfyUI workflow JSON files are free and stay free. Subscriptions and packs are only for the in-browser online generation service.

**What payment methods are accepted?**
All major credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets via Creem (the payment processor).

**Are refunds offered?**
No. All payments are final and non-refundable. New users should test the service with the 8 free welcome credits before paying. Future subscription billing can be canceled at any time from the dashboard to prevent further charges.

**Does the service work without a GPU?**
Yes — that's the whole point of the online service. Generation runs on remote GPUs; the user only needs a browser. The downloadable .safetensors files are for users who want to run LTX 2.3 locally in ComfyUI and require 16 GB+ VRAM.

**What model is used for online generation?**
LTX 2.3 22B i2v Fast at 1080p by default — the same Lightricks weights distributed via the model download pages. The platform's online tier is image-to-video first; text-to-video is a secondary feature.
